title: vg-build-task-executor return contract (v1)
description: Return JSON shape for the vg-build-task-executor subagent. Mirrors agents/vg-build-task-executor/SKILL.md > Output JSON contract. Tier 2 D — soft rollout: spawn sites MAY pass --json-schema=<this-path> to enforce shape at the subagent layer. Hard enforcement deferred to Tier 2 follow-up.

task_id.description: Full task ID (e.g., task-04). MUST match input task_id exactly.

artifacts_written.description: Repo-relative paths created or modified. Each MUST exist on disk.

commit_sha.description: Full or short git SHA. Orchestrator validates with git rev-parse.

bindings_satisfied.description: Subset of input binding_requirements satisfied via // vg-binding: markers.

read_evidence_path.description: Path written in step 14. NULL when no design_ref_path was passed.

build_log_path.description: Path written in step 15 — ${PHASE_DIR}/BUILD-LOG/task-${id}.md (R1a UX baseline Req 1).

test_red_evidence_path.description: TDD red evidence path (step 7a). REQUIRED when input tdd_required=true; NULL otherwise. R6 Task 9.

test_green_evidence_path.description: TDD green evidence path (step 7c). REQUIRED when input tdd_required=true; NULL otherwise. R6 Task 9.

warnings.description: Non-blocking issues (flaky test re-tried, deprecated API used).

error.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g., capsule_field_missing, typecheck_failed, tdd_test_passes_before_fix).
